---
title: "Stroke Dataset"
subtitle: " Building and evaluating a prediction model"
author: "Sivakamakshi Muthu Kumarasamy, ID = 25240080"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(table1)
library(dplyr)
library(plotly)
library(caret)
library(pROC)
library(randomForest)
library(gbm)
library(PRROC)
library(dcurves)
library(patchwork)
library(kableExtra)
library(scales)
library(MASS)
library(rpart)
library(rpart.plot)
library(e1071)
library(tree)
library(BART)
library(ROSE) 
```

## Prediction Goal


## Dataset

Dataset: Stroke Prediction Dataset

Source: https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/fedesoriano/stroke-prediction-dataset?resource=download

The study design is cross-sectional with adult patients with demographic, clinical and lifestyle characteristics.


## Dataset and Pre-processing

```{r}

set.seed(123)
stroke <- read.csv("stroke dataset.csv",
                   stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
                   na.strings = c("NA", "N/A", "", " "))

stroke <- stroke %>%
  filter(gender != "Other") %>%
  dplyr::select(-id) %>%
  mutate(
    bmi            = as.numeric(bmi),
   bmi = ave(bmi, stroke, FUN = function(x) ifelse(is.na(x), median(x, na.rm=TRUE), x)),
    stroke         = factor(stroke, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes")),
    gender         = factor(gender),
    ever_married   = factor(ever_married),
    work_type      = factor(work_type),
    Residence_type = factor(Residence_type),
    smoking_status = factor(smoking_status),
    hypertension   = factor(hypertension),
    heart_disease  = factor(heart_disease)
  )
```

```{r}
names(stroke)
```
```{r}
summary(stroke)
```

```{r}
colSums(is.na(stroke))
```

```{r}
n_stroke <- sum(stroke$stroke == "Yes")
n_stroke
```

```{r}
male <- sum(stroke$gender == "Male")
female <- sum(stroke$gender == "Female")

male
female
```
## Exploratory Visualisation

```{r}
#Age distribution by Stroke status

age_plot <- ggplot(stroke, aes(x = age, fill = stroke)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, alpha = 0.75, position = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Age distribution by Stroke status", x = "Age", y = "Count", fill = "Stroke") + 
  theme_minimal()

# Stroke status by average glucose levels
glucose_plot <- ggplot(stroke, aes(x = avg_glucose_level, fill = stroke)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 40, alpha = 0.75, position = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Stroke status by average glucose levels", x = "Average glucose levels", y = "Count", fill = "Stroke") + 
  theme_minimal()


# Stroke rate by BMI category
bmi_plot <- ggplot(stroke, aes(x = stroke, y = bmi, fill  = stroke)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(title = "Stroke status by BMI levels", x = "Stroke", y = "BMI", fill = "Stroke") +
  theme_minimal()

#Stroke rate by heart disease

heart_plot <- stroke %>%
  count(heart_disease, stroke) %>%
  group_by(heart_disease) %>%
  mutate(proportion = n / sum(n)) %>%
  filter(stroke == "Yes") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = heart_disease, y = proportion, fill = heart_disease)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format())+
  labs(title  = "Stroke status by heart diseases", x = "Heart Disease  0 = No, 1 = Yes", y = "Stroke", fill = "Stroke") +
  theme_minimal()

#Stroke status by hypertension
  
htn_plot <- stroke%>%
  count(hypertension, stroke) %>%
  group_by(hypertension) %>%
  mutate(proportion = n / sum(n)) %>%
  filter(stroke == "Yes") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = hypertension, y = proportion, fill = hypertension)) +
  geom_col()+
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format())+
  labs(title = "Stroke status by hypertension", x = "Hypertension 0 = No, 1 = Yes", y = "Stroke", fill = "Stroke")+
  theme_minimal()

(age_plot | glucose_plot) /  bmi_plot / (heart_plot | htn_plot)
```

## Cross-validation

```{r}
# Train/test split

set.seed(123)
n           <- nrow(stroke)
train_index <- sample(1:n, size = 0.7 * n)
train       <- stroke[train_index, ]
test        <- stroke[-train_index, ]

cat("Training set size:", nrow(train), "\n")
cat("Test set size:",     nrow(test),  "\n")

test_actual <- factor(test$stroke, levels = c("No", "Yes"))

cat("Training set stroke prevalence:", round(mean(train$stroke == "Yes")*100, 2), "%\n")
cat("Test set stroke prevalence:", round(mean(test$stroke == "Yes")*100, 2), "%\n")
```
```{r}
set.seed(123)

train_bal <- ovun.sample(stroke ~ ., data = train, method = "both")$data

cat("Balanced training set stroke prevalence:",
    round(mean(train_bal$stroke == "Yes") * 100, 2), "%\n")

```


## Logistic Regression  - Full Model

```{r}
log_model <- glm(stroke ~., data = train_bal, family = binomial)

summary(log_model)

```

```{r}
# Prediction

log_pred <- predict(log_model, newdata = test, type = "response")

roc_curve <- roc(test$stroke, log_pred)

best_thresh_log <- coords(roc_curve, "best", ret = "threshold")$threshold

log_pred_class <- factor(ifelse(log_pred > best_thresh_log, "Yes", "No"),
                          levels = c("No", "Yes"))


confusionMatrix(log_pred_class, test_actual, positive = "Yes")

plot(roc_curve, col = "steelblue", main = "ROC Curve - Logistic Regression")

auc_full <- auc(roc_curve)

cat("AUC (logistic):", round(auc_full, 3), "\n")

```

```{r}
# Variable Selection

step_model <- stepAIC(log_model, direction = "both",trace = FALSE)
summary(step_model)
```

```{r}
AIC(log_model, step_model)
```

```{r}
# Predictions

step_pred <- predict(step_model, newdata = test, type = "response")

roc_step <- roc(test$stroke, step_pred)

best_step_thresh <- coords(roc_step, "best", ret="threshold")$threshold

step_pred_class <- factor(ifelse(step_pred > 0.5, "Yes", "No"), levels = c("No", "Yes"))

# Confusion Matrix
confusionMatrix(step_pred_class, test_actual, positive = "Yes")

# ROC and AUC

plot(roc_step, col="blue", main="ROC Curve - Stepwise Logistic Regression")

auc_step <- auc(roc_step)
cat("AUC (stepwise):", round(auc_step, 3), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Variable Importance

step_varimp <- varImp(step_model, scale = TRUE)
step_varimp_df <- as.data.frame(step_varimp)
step_varimp_df$Variable <- rownames(step_varimp_df)
rownames(step_varimp_df) <- NULL

imp_col <- names(step_varimp_df)[1]
step_varimp_df <- step_varimp_df %>% arrange(desc(.data[[imp_col]]))

step_varimp_df %>% kable(caption = "Variable Importance - Stepwise Logistic Regression")


ggplot(step_varimp_df, aes(x = reorder(Variable, .data[[imp_col]]), y = .data[[imp_col]])) +
  geom_col(fill = "green") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Variable Importance - Stepwise Logistic Regression",
       x = "Variable",
       y = "Importance (scaled)") +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}

# Decision Tree

set.seed(123)
tree_model <- rpart(
  stroke ~ .,
  data    = train_bal,
  method  = "class",
  control = rpart.control(cp = 0.01, minsplit = 20, minbucket = 7)
)
printcp(tree_model)
plotcp(tree_model)

```


```{r}

cp_table <- tree_model$cptable
min_idx   <- which.min(cp_table[,"xerror"])
threshold <- cp_table[min_idx, "xerror"] + cp_table[min_idx, "xstd"]
best_cp   <- cp_table[min(which(cp_table[,"xerror"] <= threshold)), "CP"]
tree_pruned <- prune(tree_model, cp = best_cp)

rpart.plot(tree_pruned, main = "Pruned decision tree")

```
```{r}
tree_prob <- predict(tree_pruned, test, type = "prob")[, "Yes"]

tree_class <- factor(ifelse(tree_prob > 0.5, "Yes", "No"), levels = c("No", "Yes"))

confusionMatrix(tree_class, test_actual, positive = "Yes")


roc_tree <- roc(test$stroke, tree_prob)

best_thresh_tree <- coords(roc_tree, "best", ret = "threshold")$threshold

auc_tree <- auc(roc_tree)
cat("AUC (tree):",     round(auc_tree, 3), "\n")

plot(roc_tree, col = "darkorange", main = "ROC – Decision Tree")

```


```{r}
# Random Forest

set.seed(123)
rf_model <- randomForest(
  stroke ~ .,
  data       = train_bal,
  ntree      = 200,
  importance = TRUE
)

print(rf_model)

# Predictions
rf_pred <- predict(rf_model, newdata = test)
rf_prob <- predict(rf_model, newdata = test, type = "prob")[,2]

# Confusion Matrix
confusionMatrix(rf_pred, test_actual, positive = "Yes")

# ROC and AUC
roc_rf <- roc(test$stroke, rf_prob)
plot(roc_rf, col="darkgreen", main="ROC Curve - Random Forest")

auc_rf <- auc(roc_rf)
cat("AUC for Random Forest:", round(auc_rf,3), "\n")


varImpPlot(rf_model, main="Variable Importance - Random Forest")

```


```{r}
model_summary <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Logistic Full", "Logistic Stepwise", "Decision Tree", "Random Forest"),
  AUC = c(auc_full, auc_step, auc_tree, auc_rf)
)
print(model_summary)
```

#Complete Tree Analysis

```{r}
table(stroke$stroke)
set.seed(123)
```
```{r}

tree.stroke.train <- tree(stroke ~ ., data = train_bal)

```
```{r}
print("Tree Summary")
summary(tree.stroke.train)

plot(tree.stroke.train)
text(tree.stroke.train, pretty = 0)


#Predictions

tree.pred <- predict(tree.stroke.train, test, type = "class")
table(tree.pred, test$stroke)
mean(tree.pred != test$stroke)
```

```{r}
#CV pruning

set.seed(123)
cv.stroke <- cv.tree(tree.stroke.train, FUN = prune.misclass)

names(cv.stroke)


par(mfrow = c(1,2))
plot(cv.stroke$size, cv.stroke$dev, type = "b",
     xlab = "Tree Size", ylab = "Deviance")

plot(cv.stroke$k, cv.stroke$dev, type = "b",
     xlab = "Complexity Parameter", ylab = "Deviance")

par(mfrow = c(1,1))
best.size <- cv.stroke$size[which.min(cv.stroke$dev)]

prune.stroke <- prune.misclass(tree.stroke.train, best = best.size)

```
```{r}
plot(prune.stroke)
text(prune.stroke, pretty = 0)
```
```{r}

#Testing pruned tree

pruned.pred <- predict(prune.stroke, test, type = "class")
table(pruned.pred, test$stroke)

mean(pruned.pred != test$stroke)

```

```{r}
p_vars <- ncol(train_bal) - 1

set.seed(1)
bag_model <- randomForest(stroke ~ ., data = train_bal,
                          mtry = p_vars, importance = TRUE)
bag_model

# Predictions
bag_pred <- predict(bag_model, newdata = test)
bag_prob <- predict(bag_model, newdata = test, type = "prob")[, 2]

# Confusion Matrix
confusionMatrix(bag_pred, test_actual, positive = "Yes")

# ROC and AUC
roc_bag <- roc(ifelse(test_actual == "Yes", 1, 0), bag_prob)
plot(roc_bag, col = "hotpink", main = "ROC Curve - Bagging")
auc_bag <- auc(roc_bag)
cat("AUC for Bagging:", round(auc_bag, 3), "\n")

varImpPlot(bag_model, main = "Variable Importance - Bagging")


```

```{r}

train_gbm        <- train_bal
train_gbm$stroke <- ifelse(train_gbm$stroke == "Yes", 1, 0)

set.seed(1)
boost_model <- gbm(stroke ~ ., data = train_gbm,
                   distribution = "bernoulli",
                   n.trees = 5000,
                   interaction.depth = 4,
                   shrinkage = 0.001,
                   cv.folds = 10,
                   verbose = FALSE)

best_iter <- gbm.perf(boost_model, method = "cv")
cat("Best number of trees (CV):", best_iter, "\n")

summary(boost_model)

# Partial dependence plots for top 2 predictors
top2 <- summary(boost_model, plotit = FALSE)$var[1:2]
plot(boost_model, i = top2[1])
plot(boost_model, i = top2[2])

# Predictions
boost_prob  <- predict(boost_model, newdata = test,
                       n.trees = best_iter, type = "response")
boost_class <- factor(ifelse(boost_prob > 0.5, "Yes", "No"),
                      levels = c("No", "Yes"))

# Confusion Matrix
confusionMatrix(boost_class, test_actual, positive = "Yes")

# ROC and AUC
roc_boost <- roc(ifelse(test_actual == "Yes", 1, 0), boost_prob)
plot(roc_boost, col = "purple", main = "ROC Curve - Boosting")
cat("AUC for Boosting:", round(auc(roc_boost), 3), "\n")

```

```{r}

# BART

x_train <- model.matrix(stroke ~ . - 1, data = train)
y_train <- as.numeric(train$stroke == "Yes")
x_test  <- model.matrix(stroke ~ . - 1, data = test)

set.seed(1)
bartfit <- pbart(x.train = x_train,
                 y.train = y_train,
                 x.test  = x_test)

# Posterior mean predicted probabilities
bart_prob  <- bartfit$prob.test.mean
bart_class <- factor(ifelse(bart_prob > 0.5, "Yes", "No"),
                     levels = c("No", "Yes"))

# Confusion Matrix
confusionMatrix(bart_class, test_actual, positive = "Yes")

# ROC and AUC
roc_bart <- roc(ifelse(test_actual == "Yes", 1, 0), bart_prob)
plot(roc_bart, col = "brown", main = "ROC Curve - BART")
cat("AUC for BART:", round(auc(roc_bart), 3), "\n")

# Variable inclusion counts (equivalent of variable importance)
ord <- order(bartfit$varcount.mean, decreasing = TRUE)
bartfit$varcount.mean[ord]

```

```{r}

# ROC curves for all models
plot(roc_curve,  col = "steelblue",   lwd = 2,
     main = "ROC comparison - all models")
plot(roc_step,   col = "dodgerblue",  lwd = 2, lty = 2, add = TRUE)
plot(roc_tree,   col = "darkorange",  lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
plot(roc_bag,    col = "hotpink",     lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
plot(roc_rf,     col = "forestgreen", lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
plot(roc_boost,  col = "purple",      lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
plot(roc_bart,   col = "brown",       lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
abline(a = 0, b = 1, lty = 3, col = "grey60")

legend("bottomright", bty = "n",
       legend = c(
         paste("Logistic (full)     AUC =", round(auc(roc_curve), 3)),
         paste("Logistic (stepwise) AUC =", round(auc(roc_step),  3)),
         paste("Decision tree       AUC =", round(auc(roc_tree),  3)),
         paste("Bagging             AUC =", round(auc_bag,        3)),
         paste("Random forest       AUC =", round(auc_rf,         3)),
         paste("Boosting            AUC =", round(auc(roc_boost), 3)),
         paste("BART                AUC =", round(auc(roc_bart),  3))
       ),
       col = c("steelblue", "dodgerblue", "darkorange",
               "hotpink", "forestgreen", "purple", "brown"),
       lwd = 2)

```
